content.rendered:
Welcome to Forecast Immigration Law Firm

Elevate Your Lifestyle with Citizenship by Investment

Discover New Business Opportunities with Our Citizenship by Investment, Residency and Business Immigration Streams.

Get a Consultation

Explore New Horizons with Forecast Immigration

Interested in acquiring a second passport for more financial freedom? Embrace the pathway to liberty and discover your gateway to a fresh beginning.

Get a Consultation

Grow Your Business in Your Dream Destination

Don't compromise your business growth if you have a weak passport. Explore new avenues of progress in global market with a strong citizenship status

Get a Consultation
2000 +

Satisfied Clients

15 +

Years of Experience with pride

70 +

Colleagues & Growing

Need Help? Call us

+92 311 1477776

We will Facilitate You to New Prospects.
Who we are

We Offer Personalized Immigration Solutions

Are you someone who wants to go up and beyond to expand your business abroad? Do you feel your current passport is a constraint in your growth? If you feel so, Forecast Immigration is here to assist you with most personalized and authentic solutions. With Citizenship by Investment, Residency, and Business Immigration, you can experience a world of opportunities which was unknown to you. Relocation, settlement, secure investment options, and everything that you are looking for is now available under one roof. 

Citizenship By Investment

It's your time to become a Global Citizen with a strong second passport. Either donate $100K or Invest $200K or more to get travel freedom up to 145+ countries along with countless business expansion avenues.
Learn more

Residency By Investment

European Residency is now in your access. With a minimum investment of EUR 100,000, you can get Permanent Residency in Europe that is 100% leading to citizenship in few years. Don't hesitate in starting your process.
Learn more

Business Formation

The world has a lot to offer when it comes to business immigration. Establish and Expand your business with Forecast Immigration globally. With a substantial investment, ensure PR and various other benefits.

Benefits of Citizenship by Investment

Get Second Passport to get Global Mobility, Financial Stability, and Luxury but, Secure Lifestyle in 90 Days.

Business Expansion Avenues

Go borderless with business opportunities of a lifetime.

Global Mobility

The world is in your access with 145+ visa-free countries on your passport.

Huge Taxation Relief

Citizenship by Investment Countries have zero to minimum taxation.

Swift Processing

Guaranteed Global Citizenship in 90-120 Days with Forecast Immigration.

No Renunciation

Get a New & Stronger Passport without letting your Current Citizenship go.

Lifestyle Upgrade

Ensure access to Low-cost but High-quality Education & Healthcare.

Our Top Streams

Forecast Immigration has a range of comprehensive immigration solutions including Citizenship by Investment, Residency by Investment, and Business Immigration Programs, Skilled Immigration, Work Permit Visa & Visit Visa.

Get a Consultation

Take an Expert Advice

For a smooth & seamless life transition, let our immigration experts take you to your desired destination step-by-step. 

Get a Consultation
We Offer Best Services

Why Choose Forecast Immigration?

Our company’s vision revolves around navigating the complexities of immigration laws by streamlining and simplifying the procedure for our valued clients.

Apply Now

Authenticity & Transparency

We offer what we feel is best for our clients, no compromise on authenticity.

100% Client Satisfaction

We are dedicated to design & develop tailored solutions for each client.

Industry Experience

15+ years of sustaining our credibility in the Immigration Industry.

Personalized Options

We have something innovative and unconventional for everyone.

Follow us on Instagram for Latest Updates
